context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete, actionable developer onboarding guide for a Rails API app using Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis — following the rails-project-onboarding skill.

checklist.name: Prerequisites section
checklist.description: The guide includes a Prerequisites section that lists Ruby 3.2.2 (or rbenv), Docker, and git

checklist.name: bundle install step
checklist.description: The guide includes a step to run bundle install

checklist.name: .env setup step
checklist.description: The guide instructs the engineer to copy .env.example to .env and fill in the required values

checklist.name: Docker startup step
checklist.description: The guide includes docker-compose up -d (or equivalent) to start PostgreSQL and Redis

checklist.name: Database setup step
checklist.description: The guide includes rails db:create db:migrate and optionally db:seed

checklist.name: Test suite step
checklist.description: The guide includes a step to run the test suite (rspec or rails test)

checklist.name: Server startup step
checklist.description: The guide includes rails server or bundle exec rails s

checklist.name: Troubleshooting section
checklist.description: The guide has a Troubleshooting section with at least 3 common issues and solutions (e.g. port conflicts, missing .env, bundle install errors)

checklist.name: Correct env vars referenced
checklist.description: The guide references DATABASE_URL and REDIS_URL from the .env.example (not hardcoded values)

checklist.name: Step order is logical
checklist.description: The steps are in a logical sequence: clone → deps → env → Docker → DB → test → run

checklist.name: English only
checklist.description: All text in the guide is in English
